description: Project-specific override for forex-trading-system. Saxo SIM is the legitimate paper-trading broker; saxo/saxo bank dropped from broker_names. All live-capital phrases retained.
notes: Saxo / saxo bank deliberately removed -- this project's paper-trading SIM is on Saxo. Live-capital intent is enforced by the live_capital_phrases list, not by the broker name.

Phrases like 'submit order' / 'place order' / 'execute trade' are removed because they appear in normal paper-trading code review and would generate false positives. Live-account phrases ('switch to live account', 'go to live account') are added to compensate.
